summary: Renamed budget --max-renewal to --max-annual-cost; updated help text, README, SKILL examples.
reason: budget command treated --max-renewal as an amortised annual cap (total/years) but named the flag as if it capped the raw renewal price. gen suggest's --max-renewal correctly caps raw renewal and was left unchanged.
validated_outcome: Help output shows the formula; smoke-tested both old budget call patterns rejected with unknown-flag and new flag accepted.
